SEARCH
Package model.users

Class User

java.lang.Object
model.users.User
Direct Known Subclasses:
Admin, Customer, Organizer
public abstract class User extends Object
Abstract base class representing a generic user in the TicketMiner system. Stores common identity and authentication fields shared by all user types.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    User()
    Constructs a default User with no initial field values.
    User(int userID, String firstName, String lastName, String username, String password, String userType)
    Constructs a User with the specified identity and authentication details.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getFirstName()
    Returns the first name of this user.
    String
    getLastName()
    Returns the last name of this user.
    String
    getPassword()
    Returns the password for this user.
    int
    getUserID()
    Returns the unique numeric identifier for this user.
    String
    getUsername()
    Returns the username used to identify and authenticate this user.
    String
    getUserType()
    Returns the role/type of this user (e.g., Customer, Organizer, Admin).
    void
    setFirstName(String firstName)
    Sets the first name of this user.
    void
    setLastName(String lastName)
    Sets the last name of this user.
    void
    setPassword(String password)
    Sets the password for this user.
    void
    setUserID(int userID)
    Sets the unique numeric identifier for this user.
    void
    setUsername(String username)
    Sets the username for this user.
    void
    setUserType(String userType)
    Sets the role/type of this user.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a formatted string representation of this user including ID, full name, username, and type.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User()
      Constructs a default User with no initial field values.

    • User

      public User(int userID, String firstName, String lastName, String username, String password, String userType)
      Constructs a User with the specified identity and authentication details.
      Parameters:
      userID - the unique numeric identifier for the user
      firstName - the user's first name
      lastName - the user's last name
      username - the username used for login
      password - the password used for authentication
      userType - the role/type of the user (e.g., Customer, Organizer, Admin)

  • Method Details

    • getFirstName

      public String getFirstName()
      Returns the first name of this user.
      Returns:
      the user's first name

    • setFirstName

      public void setFirstName(String firstName)
      Sets the first name of this user.
      Parameters:
      firstName - the new first name

      public String getLastName()
      Returns the last name of this user.

    • setLastName

      Sets the last name of this user.
      Parameters:
      lastName - the new last name

    • getUsername

      public String getUsername()
      Returns the username used to identify and authenticate this user.
      Returns:
      the username

    • setUsername

      public void setUsername(String username)
      Sets the username for this user.
      Parameters:

    • getPassword

      public String getPassword()
      Returns the password for this user.
      Returns:

    • setPassword

      public void setPassword(String password)

    • getUserID

      public int getUserID()
      Returns the unique numeric identifier for this user.
      Returns:
      the user ID

    • setUserID

      public void setUserID(int userID)
      Sets the unique numeric identifier for this user.
      Parameters:
      userID - the new user ID

    • getUserType

      public String getUserType()
      Returns the role/type of this user (e.g., Customer, Organizer, Admin).
      Returns:
      the user type string

    • setUserType

      public void setUserType(String userType)
      Sets the role/type of this user.
      Parameters:
      userType - the new user type string

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a formatted string representation of this user including ID, full name, username, and type.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable summary of the user
